title: Pixelmon Spawn Restricted Area
description: Datapack for the Pixelmon Mod. Disable the Pokémon spawning in certain areas of your world.
body:
# PIXELMON SPAWN RESTRICTED AREA 1.16.5 and 1.20.2


```
Minecraft version: 1.16.5 and 1.20.2
Pixelmon version: 9.1.x and 9.2.x
```


Have you ever built a big house, castle or stadium and have watched how Pokémon spawns randomly, feeling out of place? Are you the owner of a server and want some specific areas to be free of Pokémon?

**I have a solution for you.**

PixelmonSpawnRestrictedArea is a Datapack that modifies the [Pixelmon Mod](https://reforged.gg/) spawn behavour. The main purpose of this datapack is to disable the spawn in certain areas of your world using Pixelmon's Better Spawner Feature basic configuration.

**INSTALLATION AND USAGE GUIDE ARE INSIDE THE `README.MD`, ALONG WITH MORE DOCUMENTATION.  
  Please, read the `README.MD` in order to learn how to add restricted areas for Pokémon spawn.**
